---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a customization or new capability
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that is awkward or impossible today?

## Proposed behavior

What should happen instead? (Be concrete: config key, flag, UI, default.)

## Alternatives you considered

e.g. manual Photos off, different staging folder, external tools…

## Environment (optional)

- macOS version:
- Install flags / relevant `config.env`:

## Extra context

Screenshots, logs (no private paths/secrets), links to related issues.
